Describe the visual progression from the initial sky view to the camera interface usage.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a bright white overexposed area transitions to a blue sky with sun flare; at 2s, a gold smartphone is held horizontally against the sky; at 4s, the phone screen displays a camera interface capturing a plant; at 8s, a white smartphone shows a live view of a group of people posing outdoors.

question: Describe the transition from the outdoor group photo session to the interview segment.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a group of at least five people gather outdoors while a white smartphone captures them; at 12s, the phone screen displays the group sitting near a wooden fence; at 16s, a man with short gray hair appears against a white background with text identifying his role.
